name: Platform Support Request
about: Request support for a new AI coding platform
labels: platform-support

<!--
BEFORE FILING: Search existing issues — your platform may already be
requested or discussed.
-->

- [ ] I searched existing issues for this platform

## Which platform?
<!-- Name and link -->

## Does this platform have a plugin or extension system?
<!-- If yes, link to the docs. If no, explain how third-party
     integrations typically work with this tool. -->

## Platform conventions
<!-- What config format, hook mechanism, and manifest structure does
     this platform use? Understanding these is essential for adding
     support in Bundles Forge. -->

## Have you tried manual installation?
<!-- Many platforms work with Bundles Forge skills through manual setup
     even without official support. Did you try? What happened? -->
